result.title: Change your Google Account username in a few simple steps
result.description:
You asked, we delivered. If you’re a U.S. Google user, you can now change your account username to log in to tools like Gmail, Photos, Drive and more — while keeping your emails, data and account history. Here’s what to know: 

1️⃣ You can choose any available @gmail.com username. 
2️⃣ Your old username will become an alias, so you won’t lose access to it. You can still sign in and send and receive emails with both usernames. Plus, you can also revert to your old username.
3️⃣ You can choose a new username once a year — up to three times total.

result.title: How to Vibe Code a Website
result.description:
Learn how to build a professional website in 10 minutes using Google AI Studio. From mood boards to a live site, see how easy web design and vibe coding can be. 

0:00 – Define Vibe: Mood Board to Aesthetic 
0:44 – Prompt to Code: Wireframe and Structure  
1:21 – Custom Branding: Swap Your Product Images 
1:44 – Go Live: Share and Publish Website

We have a lot of educational tutorials coming, so subscribe to this channel and keep and eye out for those! In the meantime, our “Build apps in AI Studio” article is a great resource for getting started: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode
Build your ideas with Gemini: https://aistudio.google.com/apps
More information on how to ship your site or builds here: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode#deploy-or

#BuildWithGemini #VibeCoding #BuildAWebsite
